title: Lead SEO Specialist at Blue Dart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Blue Dart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Blue Dart Digital Technologies family as a SEO Specialist in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
